name: Blackmores Limited
description: Blackmores Limited is an Australian health supplements company founded in the 1930s by pioneering naturopath Maurice Blackmore. The company develops, manufactures, and distributes a diverse range of high-quality vitamins, minerals, herbal, and nutritional supplements. Operating across Australia, New Zealand, and Asia, Blackmores is committed to delivering natural health solutions backed by scientific research and rigorous quality standards, helping consumers improve their health and wellbeing naturally.
